REMITTITUR FILED COURT DETERMINES THAT THE APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICIAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT MADE & ENTERED IN MUNI COURT IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO SECTION 1034 CCP AND RULES 135A,B & C OF THE CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED THE PREVAILING PARTY.
